Name: Kyra McCandless
Comment: I've gone through so many brands during practice, but nothing covers all the bases like these kits do!

Name: Bez Gessesse
Comment: I make ceramics and I was doubtful that any bandage would stay sealed during my studio sessions. Boy, was I wrong!

Name: Lily Williams
Comment: I'm a physical therapist and I've started passing these out to my clients for home-care! Everything is labeled correctly so my clients can use them correctly.

Name: Eleanor
Comment: There are hard days when I'm training my clients, but these kits ensure that they're actually working on self-recovery and progress!

Name: Chris Lopez
Comment: I’ve set up a quarterly restock of the kits for my gym and haven’t thought about inventory since. This plan is genuinely amazing.
